code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of airport‑related triples into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject
    subject_triples = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject not in subject_triples:
            subject_triples[t.subject] = []
        subject_triples[t.subject].append(t)

    # Main subject is typically the airport
    main_subject = None
    for subj in subject_triples.keys():
        if "Airport" in subj or "airport" in subj.lower():
            main_subject = subj
            break
    if not main_subject and subject_triples:
        main_subject = list(subject_triples.keys())[0]

    if not main_subject:
        return ""

    # Build sentence parts with better organization
    sentence_parts = []
    airport_triples = subject_triples.get(main_subject, [])

    # Priority order for predicates to create natural flow
    priority_order = [
        "cityServed", "location", "country", "isPartOf",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel", "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres",
        "iataLocationIdentifier", "icaoLocationIdentifier", "locationIdentifier",
        "operatingOrganisation", "owner", "runwayLength", "1stRunwayLengthFeet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre", "runwaySurfaceType", "nativeName", "runwayName",
        "1stRunwayNumber", "1stRunwaySurfaceType"
    ]

    # Sort triples by priority
    sorted_triples = sorted(
        airport_triples,
        key=lambda t: priority_order.index(t.predicate) if t.predicate in priority_order else 999
    )

    # Build coherent sentence structure
    if not sorted_triples:
        return f"{main_subject} is an airport."

    # First part - basic location info
    location_phrases = []
    for t in sorted_triples[:3]:
        phrase = format_predicate(t.subject, t.predicate, t.object)
        if phrase:
            location_phrases.append(phrase)

    # Remaining info as additional clauses
    remaining_phrases = []
    for t in sorted_triples[3:]:
        phrase = format_predicate(t.subject, t.predicate, t.object)
        if phrase:
            remaining_phrases.append(phrase)

    # Combine into complex sentence
    if len(location_phrases) == 1:
        result = location_phrases[0]
    else:
        result = location_phrases[0]
        for i, phrase in enumerate(location_phrases[1:], 1):
            if i == 1:
                result += " which " + phrase.lower()
            else:
                result += ", and " + phrase.lower()

    # Add remaining info
    if remaining_phrases:
        if len(remaining_phrases) == 1:
            result += ", with " + remaining_phrases[0].lower()
        else:
            result += ", with " + remaining_phrases[0].lower()
            for phrase in remaining_phrases[1:]:
                result += " and " + phrase.lower()

    return result + "."

def format_predicate(subject: str, predicate: str, obj: str) -> str:
    """Format a single triple into a natural language phrase."""
    templates = {
        "cityServed": f" serves {obj}",
        "location": f" is located in {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": f" lies at an elevation of {obj} meters above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": f" lies at an elevation of {obj} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": f" lies at an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level",
        "operatingOrganisation": f" is operated by {obj}",
        "runwayLength": f" has a runway length of {obj} metres",
        "runwayName": f" has runway {obj}",
        "country": f" is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": f" is part of {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": f" has a first runway {obj} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": f" has a first runway {obj} metres long",
        "1stRunwayNumber": f" has runway number {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": f" runway surface is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": f" with IATA code {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": f" with ICAO code {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": f" with location identifier {obj}",
        "nativeName": f" known locally as {obj}",
        "owner": f" owned by {obj}",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": f" first runway surface is {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": f" second runway surface is {obj}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": f" third runway surface is {obj}",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": f" fourth runway surface is {obj}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": f" fifth runway surface is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": f" first runway is {obj} feet long",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": f" third runway is {obj} feet long",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": f" fourth runway is {obj} feet long",
        "5thRunwayNumber": f" fifth runway number is {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": f" elevation is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "runwaySurfaceType": f" runway surface type is {obj}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": f" in arrondissement {obj}",
        "mayor": f" mayor is {obj}",
        "capital": f" capital is {obj}",
        "language": f" language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": f" official language is {obj}",
        "leader": f" leader is {obj}",
        "demonym": f" demonym is {obj}",
        "currency": f" currency is {obj}",
        "regionServed": f" serves region {obj}",
        "hubAirport": f" hub airport is {obj}",
        "headquarter": f" headquarters is {obj}",
        "city": f" city is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": f" jurisdiction is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": f" leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": f" leader title is {obj}",
        "largestCity": f" largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": f" county seat is {obj}",
        "postalCode": f" postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": f" area code is {obj}",
        "foundedBy": f" founded by {obj}",
        "foundingYear": f" founded in {obj}",
        "ceremonialCounty": f" ceremonial county is {obj}",
        "class": f" class is {obj}",
        "division": f" division is {obj}",
        "order": f" order is {obj}",
        "chief": f" chief is {obj}",
        "transportAircraft": f" transport aircraft include {obj}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": f" helicopters include {obj}",
        "aircraftFighter": f" fighter aircraft include {obj}",
        "attackAircraft": f" attack aircraft include {obj}",
        "battle": f" participated in battle {obj}",
    }

    template = templates.get(predicate)
    if template:
        return template
    else:
        return f" has {predicate} {obj}"

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
